ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for additional verification */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address for billing and shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., credit card, bank account) */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number (masked for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., debit, credit) */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant for the transaction */,
  "merchant_location" TEXT /* Location of the merchant */,
  "is_pending" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is pending */,
  "is_disputed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is disputed */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expense_categories ("expense_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the budget */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the budget */,
  "budget_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Amount of the budget */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget was last updated */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the budget (e.g., monthly, weekly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the budget */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the budget */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the budget is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_transactions" (
  "budget_transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget transaction */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_transactions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_transactions_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_categories" (
  "expense_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_transactions" (
  "expense_transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense transaction */,
  "expense_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense category associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_transactions_expense_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_category_id") REFERENCES expense_categories ("expense_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_transactions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget associated with the alert */,
  "alert_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold amount for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is active */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., low balance, high spending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "alert_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert log was last updated */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert log has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
